name: Items Zero
query:
SELECT
    i.item_code,
    i.item_name,
    i.item_group,

    SUM(CASE WHEN b.warehouse = 'Pharmcy - SH' THEN b.actual_qty ELSE 0 END) AS `Pharmcy - SH`,
    SUM(CASE WHEN b.warehouse = 'Pharmacy Store - SH' THEN b.actual_qty ELSE 0 END) AS `Pharmacy Store - SH`

FROM `tabItem` i
LEFT JOIN `tabBin` b
    ON b.item_code = i.item_code

WHERE
    i.disabled = 0
    AND i.item_group = 'Drug'

GROUP BY
    i.item_code, i.item_name, i.item_group

ORDER BY
    i.item_name;
